'''âd-w-h-ch''' ('''kadawhechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chainsmoke|chainsmoke]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chainsmoke|chainsmoke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-w-h-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kadawhechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidawhechoko|thidawhechoko]] || [[word:jidawhechoko|jidawhechoko]] || [[word:shidawhechoko|shidawhechoko]] || [[word:kidawhechoko|kidawhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudawhechoko|thuthudawhechoko]] || [[word:jujudawhechoko|jujudawhechoko]] || [[word:shushudawhechoko|shushudawhechoko]] || [[word:kukudawhechoko|kukudawhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudawhechoko|thudawhechoko]] || [[word:judawhechoko|judawhechoko]] || [[word:shudawhechoko|shudawhechoko]] || [[word:kudawhechoko|kudawhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudawhechoko|thudawhechoko]] || [[word:judawhechoko|judawhechoko]] || [[word:shudawhechoko|shudawhechoko]] || [[word:kudawhechoko|kudawhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedawhechoko|thedawhechoko]] || [[word:jedawhechoko|jedawhechoko]] || [[word:shedawhechoko|shedawhechoko]] || [[word:kedawhechoko|kedawhechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodawhechoko|thodawhechoko]] || [[word:jodawhechoko|jodawhechoko]] || [[word:shodawhechoko|shodawhechoko]] || [[word:kodawhechoko|kodawhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodawhechoko|thodawhechoko]] || [[word:jodawhechoko|jodawhechoko]] || [[word:shodawhechoko|shodawhechoko]] || [[word:kodawhechoko|kodawhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdawhechoko|thĂŠdawhechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdawhechoko|jĂŠdawhechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdawhechoko|shĂŠdawhechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdawhechoko|kĂŠdawhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadawhechoko|thathadawhechoko]] || [[word:jajadawhechoko|jajadawhechoko]] || [[word:shashadawhechoko|shashadawhechoko]] || [[word:kakadawhechoko|kakadawhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadawhechoko|thadawhechoko]] || [[word:jadawhechoko|jadawhechoko]] || [[word:shadawhechoko|shadawhechoko]] || [[word:kadawhechoko|kadawhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadawhechoko|thadawhechoko]] || [[word:jadawhechoko|jadawhechoko]] || [[word:shadawhechoko|shadawhechoko]] || [[word:kadawhechoko|kadawhechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadawhechithi|shadawhechithi]] || [[word:shadawhechiji|shadawhechiji]] || [[word:shadawhechishi|shadawhechishi]] || [[word:shadawhechiki|shadawhechiki]]
